description: Detect a scientific data file's type — map its extension to a format category and human-readable description, and gather basic filesystem metadata (size, mtime, path). Writes a JSON descriptor.
rules: read-only — inspects the file's name + stat only, never opens its contents
pure stdlib — no scientific library or network is touched
covers 200+ extensions across chemistry, bioinformatics, microscopy, spectroscopy, omics, and general formats
result written to record_store as file_type.json
usage: Set DATA_FILE (path to the data file). Output: file_type.json (basic_info + file_type).
limitation: Detection is extension-based only; it does not sniff file contents. Unknown extensions are reported with category 'unknown'.
